# HELP python_gc_objects_collected_total Objects collected during gc
# TYPE python_gc_objects_collected_total counter
python_gc_objects_collected_total{generation="0"} 1000.0
# HELP vllm:num_requests_running Number of requests in model execution batches.
# TYPE vllm:num_requests_running gauge
vllm:num_requests_running{engine="0",model_name="test-model",pod="pod-0"} 3.0
vllm:num_requests_running{engine="0",model_name="test-model",pod="pod-1"} 2.0
# HELP vllm:num_requests_waiting Number of requests waiting to be processed.
# TYPE vllm:num_requests_waiting gauge
vllm:num_requests_waiting{engine="0",model_name="test-model",pod="pod-0"} 1.0
vllm:num_requests_waiting{engine="0",model_name="test-model",pod="pod-1"} 0.0
# HELP vllm:kv_cache_usage_perc KV-cache usage. 1 means 100 percent usage.
# TYPE vllm:kv_cache_usage_perc gauge
vllm:kv_cache_usage_perc{engine="0",model_name="test-model",pod="pod-0"} 0.45
vllm:kv_cache_usage_perc{engine="0",model_name="test-model",pod="pod-1"} 0.55
# HELP vllm:generation_tokens_total Number of generation tokens processed.
# TYPE vllm:generation_tokens_total counter
vllm:generation_tokens_total{engine="0",model_name="test-model",pod="pod-0"} 5000.0
vllm:generation_tokens_total_created{engine="0",model_name="test-model",pod="pod-0"} 1700000000.0
vllm:generation_tokens_total{engine="0",model_name="test-model",pod="pod-1"} 3000.0
vllm:generation_tokens_total_created{engine="0",model_name="test-model",pod="pod-1"} 1700000000.0
# HELP vllm:request_success_total Count of successfully processed requests.
# TYPE vllm:request_success_total counter
vllm:request_success_total{engine="0",finished_reason="stop",model_name="test-model",pod="pod-0"} 100.0
vllm:request_success_total_created{engine="0",finished_reason="stop",model_name="test-model",pod="pod-0"} 1700000000.0
vllm:request_success_total{engine="0",finished_reason="stop",model_name="test-model",pod="pod-1"} 80.0
vllm:request_success_total_created{engine="0",finished_reason="stop",model_name="test-model",pod="pod-1"} 1700000000.0
# HELP vllm:prefix_cache_hits_total Prefix cache hits, in terms of number of cached tokens.
# TYPE vllm:prefix_cache_hits_total counter

vllm:prefix_cache_hits_total_created{engine="0",model_name="test-model",pod="pod-0"} 1700000000.0

vllm:prefix_cache_hits_total_created{engine="0",model_name="test-model",pod="pod-1"} 1700000000.0

# HELP vllm:time_to_first_token_seconds Histogram of time to first token in seconds.
